Description:
Model
Brand: ASUS
Name: X903 STRIX MORPH 96/NW2/CA/ADS
Part Number: 90MP04IF-BKAA03


Keyboard
Keyboard Interface: USB + 2.4GHz + Bluetooth
Design Style: Standard
Layout: 96%
Mechanical Keyboard: Yes
Key Switch: ROG NX Snow switch V2
Key Switch Type: Linear
Keyboard Color: Black
Backlit: Per-Key RGB LEDs
Dimensions: 39.84 * 13.36 * 3.87 cm
Type: Mechanical


Mouse
Mouse Included: No


OS / System Requirement
Operating System Supported: Windows 11 / Windows 10 / MacOS


Features
Features: Full Customization Made Easy: Easily access and reassemble every layer from top cover to PCB and beyond.
Unique lighting design: Light bars along both sides and a PC positioning plate provide even illumination across the entire keyboard.
Hot-swappable ROG NX V2 Mechanical Switches:?Support more keycap profiles, deliver soft acoustics, and a refined typing feel.
South-facing PCB: Optimized for keycap compatibility and customization, allowing for personalized setups with custom keycaps and advanced lighting effects.
Silicone gasket mount: Gasket structure delivers a cushioned typing feel; underlying dampening foam can be swapped out to adjust gasket softness.
Tri-mode connection: Connect via Bluetooth® (up to three devices simultaneously), 2.4GHz with ROG SpeedNova wireless technology, or wired USB.
Ergonomic design: Two pairs of keyboard feet of different heights provide up to three tilt positions.
MacOS support: Easily toggle between Windows and MacOS modes.
Unique ROG-themed keycaps: Redesigned 3 additional translucent keycaps with ROG markings for further customization.


Package Contents
Package Contents: 1 x ROG Strix Morph 96 Wireless
1 x 2 in 1 ROG Keycap and switch puller 
3 x ROG-themed translucent keycaps 
1 x Ctrl keycap
1 x USB extender
1 x Torx Wrench
1 x A to C cable
1 x ROG sticker
1 x quick start guide
1 x warranty booklet
